executionArgs.additionalInstruction: These are frontend tests for the OAuth UI flow on the /get-started page. The page has a multi-step onboarding: Step 1 is login (email/password + Google OAuth button). After login, Step 2 shows connect integrations (Google Calendar + Todoist). Test account credentials: email test@test.com password test1234. The Google OAuth button text is "Continue with Google". When clicked it should redirect or show "Redirecting..." text. For connect step tests (OA006-OA008), first sign in with the test account to reach step 2.
